name: Rum Cake, I
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the oleo and Crisco with sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Stir in the butter, lemon, and coconut flavorings.
4. Sift the flour three times into a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the sifted flour to the mixture, alternating with buttermilk, until fully combined.
6. Pour the batter into a greased and floured Bundt or tube pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 1 1/2 hours.
